intro: This archive contains 14 articles from April 12 to April 20, 2026, detailing a series of high-severity cyber incidents. The majority of these reports were classified as high severity. Activity from the distinct threat actors Scattered Spider, W3LL, and W3LL Team was prominent during this period. Their operations primarily targeted the government, cryptocurrency, and telecommunications sectors, with additional impact on corporate and educational entities. Geographically, the incidents were concentrated in the United States and North America, particularly in Florida, with notable activity also affecting Canada and Europe.
